guide.title: How to get character data (browser only)
guide.step.2: Open the Developer Tools on your browser
guide.step.3: Scroll to "My Characters" section, click on "All characters"
guide.step.4: On Developer Tools, go to Network tab and find the request "POST https://sg-public-api.hoyolab.com/event/game_record/genshin/api/character/list"
guide.step.5: Copy the response of that request into the input
